name: revbrain
description: Hexagonal architecture monorepo with vendor-agnostic design

scripts.commands: node -e "const P=27;const h=[['','── Run Modes ─────────────────────────────────────────────'],['pnpm mock','Fully local, offline mode. Uses in-memory mock repos,'],['~','mock auth, and seed-data. Works immediately after clone.'],['~','No Supabase, no network, no secrets needed.'],['pnpm dev','Local dev server (client + API) against the STAGING'],['~','Supabase project. Requires .env.staging with real keys.'],['~','Use this when you need real DB/auth but want hot-reload.'],['pnpm stg','Client-only against the deployed staging Edge Functions.'],['~','No local server — the client talks directly to staging.'],['~','Use this to test the deployed API without touching code.'],['',''],['','── Build & Quality ───────────────────────────────────────'],['pnpm build','Production build of all packages (via Turbo).'],['pnpm lint','Run ESLint across all packages.'],['pnpm format','Auto-format all files with Prettier.'],['pnpm format:check','Check formatting without writing (CI-friendly).'],['pnpm test','Run all tests (unit + integration).'],['pnpm test:unit','Unit tests only.'],['pnpm test:integration','Integration tests only.'],['',''],['','── Database ──────────────────────────────────────────────'],['pnpm db:generate','Generate Drizzle migration files from schema changes.'],['pnpm db:migrate','Apply pending migrations to the staging database.'],['pnpm db:seed','Seed the staging database with sample data.'],['',''],['','── Worker (CPQ Extraction) ───────────────────────────────'],['pnpm worker:dev','Run the extraction worker in dev mode.'],['pnpm worker:seed-findings','Seed mock assessment findings for local dev.'],['',''],['','── Performance ───────────────────────────────────────────'],['pnpm perf:test','Run Playwright performance tests.'],['pnpm perf:edge','Benchmark Edge Function cold/warm starts.'],['pnpm perf:edge:quick','Quick edge benchmark (skip wait).'],['pnpm perf:baseline','Capture performance baseline snapshot.'],['pnpm perf:compare','Compare current perf against saved baseline.'],['',''],['','── Housekeeping ──────────────────────────────────────────'],['pnpm clean','Remove all node_modules and Turbo caches.'],['pnpm setup:cloud','Initialize Supabase cloud project (first-time setup).'],['pnpm commands','Show this reference.'],];console.log('\n  RevBrain CLI Reference\n');h.forEach(([cmd,desc])=>{if(!cmd&&!desc)console.log('');else if(cmd==='~')console.log('  '+' '.repeat(P)+desc);else if(!cmd)console.log('  '+desc);else console.log('  \x1b[36m'+cmd.padEnd(P)+'\x1b[0m'+desc)});console.log('')"
